content: 2024-2025 SOTA active learning agent memory architectures can be repurposed to resolve a longstanding performance gap between intrinsic curiosity modules (ICM), random network distillation (RND), and heuristic curious agents by storing sparse, unexpected state representations that amplify intrinsic reward signal without catastrophic forgetting of novel environments. This memory-augmented curiosity framework reframes intrinsic reward calibration not as a prediction error problem, but as an active sampling problem for which SOTA active memory systems are already optimized.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
trigger_topic: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
